creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
Christmas magic at @westfieldlondon with @theeclecticcollectionofficial and I’m officially obsessed with their entire festive pâtisserie lineup. Every piece is handcrafted like a tiny work of art, with layers, textures and flavours that feel straight out of a luxury patisserie kitchen. ✨🎄 with @kseniia.journey 

🎄 The Christmas Tree
Vanilla mousse, raspberry gel, gianduja cremeux and hazelnut sponge — light, nutty, creamy and beautifully balanced.

🔴 The Bauble
Cherry & yoghurt mousse, cherry gel, chocolate sponge and dark chocolate cremeux — tangy, rich and perfectly festive.

🍪 The Gingerbread Man
Caramel chocolate mousse with ginger caramel — warm spices wrapped in silky chocolate… pure Christmas comfort.

🎁 The Present Box
Milk chocolate mousse with zesty mandarin compote — sweet, bright and such a fun flavour twist.

Every bite tasted as gorgeous as it looked — delicate textures, glossy finishes, rich mousses, silky cremeux, sharp gels, soft sponges… everything made with so much care. Truly one of the cutest (and tastiest!) festive collections I’ve tried this year. ❤️✨
